title: Add Author Section to README
description: Update the README.md file to include an 'Author' section with the relevant author information.
details: Open the project's README.md file. Add a clearly labeled 'Author' section at the end (or in an appropriate place according to existing structure). Include the author's name and, if applicable, contact information or GitHub profile link. Ensure formatting is consistent with the rest of the README (use Markdown headings and lists as appropriate).
test_strategy: Review the updated README.md file in a Markdown viewer to ensure the 'Author' section appears correctly, is formatted consistently, and contains accurate information. Optionally, have a team member review for clarity and completeness.
